title: SpotDraft User
description: The response for the user created in SpotDraft

first_name.description: The first name of the user.

last_name.description: The last name of the user.

roles.description: The list of roles for the user.

username.description: The email address of the user.

created.description: The ISO timestamp when the user was created.

modified.description: The ISO timestamp when the user was last modified.
